case_title: 1499 CALIFORNIA STREET LLC VS. ISAIAH WARE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70481131) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1499 CALIFORNIA STREET LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WARE, ISAIAH

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1499 CALIFORNIA STREET LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WARE, ISAIAH DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1499 CALIFORNIA STREET LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARE, ISAIAH DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1499 CALIFORNIA STREET APT.116 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70481131)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70481131) AS TO DEFENDANT WARE, ISAIAH DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1499 CALIFORNIA STREET LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WARE, ISAIAH DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE - UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 70482968) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1499 CALIFORNIA STREET LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WARE, ISAIAH
DECLARATION OF DAILY FAIR RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1499 CALIFORNIA STREET LLC
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 70226978) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1499 CALIFORNIA STREET LLC
